name: py2rust-ccbrd-ccbd-wire-protocol
title: ccbrd 实现 Python 线协议合同；ccb-legacy 保持 Python 100% 兼容
description: Make ccbrd speak the Python-derived ccbd wire contract for the Rust ccbr client set, while keeping Python ccb runtime isolated. ccb-legacy is the separate Rust bloodline that must stay 100% compatible with Python ccb 7.5.2.
creator: luck
